commentaries.author: George Leo Haydock
commentaries.content: 1 Esdras Wisdom of Solomon Wisdom of Sirach Epistle of Jeremiah Prayer of Manasseh In your filthiness is lewdness: because I have purged you, and you were not purged, you shall not be purged from your filthiness any more, till I have caused my fury to rest upon you. Hebrew, "In thy crime there is design "or malice. This rendered the Jews so hateful (Calmet) and irreclaimable. (Haydock) God had given them abundant instructions (Calmet) and graces; but all was contemned. (Haydock) When the fire of tribulation does not amend sinners, they are sentenced to hell fire. (Worthington).

methodology.step_1: Parse main page with BeautifulSoup for structure
methodology.step_3: Use Firecrawl to get full content from 'Go to Commentary' links
methodology.step_4: Fallback to BeautifulSoup for accordion content if needed
advantages: Records verses even without commentaries for complete tracking
